description: Index for audit_run_id g9_level_a_fullsix_20260410: Evaluator A and B raw matrices preserved separately; full per-cell delta computed; independence evidence remains below roadmap Level B (see g9b_level_b_attempt_record.json, g9b_evaluator_b_declaration.json).
